existing customers who opted in to Regulatory feed monitoring updates

public business directories whose terms permit research
forbidden_collection: purchased, stolen, or unverifiable contact lists

tools.name: Permission-gated lead discovery and follow-up system

data_contract.storage_policy: store useful project artifacts only; raw credentials are forbidden; raw biometric media remains local or in an encrypted owner vault
data_contract.retention: owner-configurable with deletion and revocation support

approvals.contact_requirement: verified user-owned destination and explicit channel opt-in
approvals.execution_rule: approval authorizes one scoped action; it never exposes credentials to the bot or browser

sandbox.release_gate: all applicable checks pass and owner approves any live action

readiness.production_gate: implement or configure adapters, pass sandbox checks, add authentication, and verify deployment telemetry

bots.sample_test_prompt: Test Regulatory Change Auto-Integrator in sandbox mode. Use synthetic data, demonstrate Regulatory feed monitoring, record evidence, and stop before any live external action.

Needs help with Alignment gap identification
Needs help with Harmonization recommendation engine
Needs help with Policy template standardization
Needs help with Version synchronization
exclusion_rules: no minors
no protected or sensitive trait targeting
no deceptive identity or impersonation
no lead without traceable source evidence

query_templates: Group legal directors, policy administrators requesting Cross-entity policy comparison
organizations seeking policy-alignment support
inbound requests matching Multi-Entity Policy Aligner
existing customers who opted in to Cross-entity policy comparison updates
authorized_source_types: existing customer records with documented relationship
public business directories whose terms permit research
forbidden_collection: purchased, stolen, or unverifiable contact lists

required_fields: contact permission basis and channel scope

tools.name: Permission-gated lead discovery and follow-up system

data_contract.storage_policy: store useful project artifacts only; raw credentials are forbidden; raw biometric media remains local or in an encrypted owner vault
data_contract.retention: owner-configurable with deletion and revocation support

approvals.contact_requirement: verified user-owned destination and explicit channel opt-in
approvals.execution_rule: approval authorizes one scoped action; it never exposes credentials to the bot or browser

sandbox.release_gate: all applicable checks pass and owner approves any live action

readiness.production_gate: implement or configure adapters, pass sandbox checks, add authentication, and verify deployment telemetry

bots.sample_test_prompt: Test Multi-Entity Policy Aligner in sandbox mode. Use synthetic data, demonstrate Cross-entity policy comparison, record evidence, and stop before any live external action.
